title: Pizza After Patrol
shortDescription: Stopping for a quick pizza break after a long patrol.
fullDescription: Even heroes need a lunch break! We stopped for an amazing pepperoni pizza to refuel before heading out on our next mission.
favoriteMoment: The cheese pull on that slice!

title: First Order Encounter
shortDescription: A close call with Kylo Ren and the First Order guards.
fullDescription: While navigating the corridors, we had to use stealth to slip past First Order guards. But then Kylo Ren spotted us! A truly epic close encounter in the outer rim.
favoriteMoment: Posing for the photo right next to Kylo Ren.

title: Meeting Rey
fullDescription: A special morning adventure! We got to meet Rey in person, talk about the Resistance, and learn some force moves.
missionOutcome: Secured an amazing photo with Rey.
favoriteMoment: Smiling for the camera with a real Jedi.

title: Millennium Falcon Recon
shortDescription: Scouting the Millennium Falcon and meeting Rey.
fullDescription: Our mission took us to the edge of the galaxy, Batuu! We explored the Black Spire Outpost and even learned some force moves straight from Rey outside the fastest ship in the galaxy.
favoriteMoment: Standing right next to the Falcon.

title: Bananas Player Photo
fullDescription: We bumped into one of the Banana ball stars in the hall and managed to get a great picture. What an awesome guy, taking time out for the fans!

title: Firetruck Cockpit Check
shortDescription: Sitting inside the massive cab of a real firetruck.
fullDescription: We were granted classified access to sit right where the driver steers! Checking out all the headsets, radios, and buttons inside the truck cab.
missionOutcome: Learned what all the buttons do.

title: Poster Drawing Duty
shortDescription: Crafting the perfect sign for the game.
fullDescription: We got out the markers and started designing the best, most colorful sign to show off our Bananas pride. Everyone pitched in!

title: Feline Friend Protocol
shortDescription: A tactical cuddle alliance with the cat.
fullDescription: The mission was to negotiate a peace treaty and get some solid cuddles with the softest furry friend. Both parties were extremely satisfied with the arrangement.

title: Banana Ball Stadium View
shortDescription: Surveying the field at Petco Park for Banana Ball.
fullDescription: We got amazing seats right by the field level to catch all the trick plays. The sun was shining over Petco Park—a perfect day for baseball.
missionOutcome: Secured the best seats in the house.

title: Fire Engine Briefing
shortDescription: Learning the ropes at the fire station.
fullDescription: Gathered around the side of a huge fire engine, we got an up-close look at all the hoses, gauges, and equipment. The firefighters showed us how everything works!
favoriteMoment: Seeing the massive hoses up close.
